expectations.evidence: Response provides 5 touches: Day 0 (Email), Day 2 (LinkedIn), Day 4 (Email case study), Day 7 (Phone call), Day 10 (Email summary). Timeline spans 14 days as requested.

Tone is professional, respectful, and focuses on strategic business impact. Example: 'في شركات البناء بحجمكم، هامش الخطأ في تقدير التكاليف والمهل الزمنية ضيق جداً' - direct, peer-to-peer, respecting decision-maker time constraints.

Response explicitly references Saudi context: 'في السعودية، هامش الخطأ في تقدير التكاليف' and 'المشاريع الحكومية الضخمة (رؤية 2030)' and uses Saudi Riyal currency: '50 مليون ريال' and 'شركات البناء بالسعودية'

expectations.text: Includes at least 2 different channels (email + LinkedIn or call)
expectations.evidence: Sequence uses 3 channels: Email (touches 1, 3, 5), LinkedIn (touch 2), Phone (touch 4). Specifically mentions 'البريد الإلكتروني + LinkedIn + الهاتف' in header.

expectations.text: Each touch has specific copy (subject + body or message text)
expectations.evidence: All 5 touches include complete, specific copy: Touch 1 has subject 'تقليل تكاليف المشاريع بـ 12-15%' with full body text, Touch 2 has LinkedIn message copy, Touch 3 has subject and body about case study, Touch 4 has phone script with opening and response paths, Touch 5 has subject 'حديث سريع' with body.
